tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The laboratory results show an elevated HbA1c (6.4%), indicating impaired glucose metabolism consistent with prediabetes or early diabetes. All other parameters, including renal function, electrolytes, and calcium, are within normal limits. Recommend clinical follow-up for glycemic control and diabetes risk assessment.

text.div: Provenance for SYNDERAI Synthetic Example Data Resource
Laboratory: Laboratoire Central Européenne, 1000 Brussels, Belgium
